productDisplayName: Highlander Men Green Black Checked Slim Fit Shirt
description: Composition100% cotton shirt with full sleeves, has plaid checks in green and black with grey-white accents, black stitch detailing, tape detailing  on the in-seam of the collar  with appliqued brand name on the facing placket, patch pocket on the left chest with black thread detailing, full length buttoned placket and curved hemline, embroidered logo on pocketFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this plaid shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
